agent: Training Run Monitor + First Autonomous Rich Timing Paper Trade Agent
critical_path: clean XAU decision_ppo training (with full MTF data reliability fixes + session/news timing features + shaped rewards + TimeExitSpec learning + automatic analyzer)

training.launch_cmd: python launch_decision_ppo_training.py --symbol XAUUSDm --timesteps 50000 (via venv, AGI_DECISION_PPO=1, explicit redirect)
training.progress: HEALTHY AND ADVANCING: step=5,000/50,000 (10% in ~51s, ETA ~7-8min to next major); mem~1GB, CPU active. Full MTF reliability + timing/reward features active in this run.
issues_resolved: Previous 0-byte/early-crash launches due to wrong python (non-venv) and OOM from concurrent LSTM training (6.7GB on 12GB RAM box)
Stray system python 3312 killed; heavy LSTM 4488 killed to free RAM
Current run using correct .venv312 python, 917MB stable
training.mtf_reliability: FIXES ACTIVE (Python/data_feed.py hardened with _load_local_test_data, resample, kwarg alias, cache fallback for XAU 1m+ higher TFs when MT5 limited). Logs will show LOCAL_TEST_CACHE / RESAMPLED / MTF ROBUST when exercised. Launcher used best_features_per_symbol.
training.timing_features: WIRED: drl/trading_env.py passes news_proximity, major_open_window, news_avoidance_zone to reward (shaped_reward + TradingReward blend). TimeExitSpec in TradeDecision (close_before_high_impact_news, close_at_session_end, max_hold_*, force_close_before). Env has news_avoidance_hold_minutes=25, open_volatility_hold_minutes=45 defaults for decision_ppo.
training.shaped_rewards: ACTIVE (bonus_contrib - penalty_scale*penalty_contrib, blended 0.6*TradingReward + 0.4*shaped; penalty_scale configurable; timing signals influence)
training.timeexitspec_learning: Supported via rich 18-dim decision_ppo action space (includes time_exit fields in decoded TradeDecision); env supports time_exit closes; reward attribution for timing via journal + analyzer feedback loop.

coordination.production_hardening: decision_ppo_execution_agent.json, risk_supervisor.py, risk_engine.py (timing-aware defer for TimeExitSpec/news), paper_mt5_execution_harness.py (respects TimeExitSpec)
coordination.issues_reported: RAM contention on 12GB VPS; resolved by terminating competing LSTM. Monitor for further OOM or data issues.
coordination.suggestions: If training stalls >30min at low step or OOM recurs, reduce n_envs or timesteps temporarily; or pause other agents. Post-run: verify *_timing_insights.json has strong open/news signals before promoting.

forward_progress: Aggressive: training launched successfully on critical path. Monitor streaming. Will babysit to completion -> analyzer -> candidate quality gate -> full closed loop first rich timing paper trade. 100% goal in sight once this run produces timing-proficient model.
next_update_trigger: New monitor events or training progress >5k steps or completion marker
